metadata_identification.title: is described by
metadata_identification.description: Inverse relation between dataset and metadata record.

version.title: version
version.description: The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource.

title.title: title
title.description: A name given to the dataset.

publication_year.title: publication year
publication_year.description: The year when the item was or will be made publicly available.

time_reference.title: has time reference
time_reference.description: Reference to events related to the dataset.

other_language.title: has other language
other_language.description: Any other languages of the Dataset.

description.title: has description
description.description: Relation to the description of a dataset.

location.title: has location
location.description: The geographical area covered by the dataset.

funding_reference.title: has funding reference
funding_reference.description: Has reference for funding of a dataset acquisition.

related_resource.title: has related resource
related_resource.description: Reference to the resource in any way related to the described dataset.

validation_result.title: has validation result
validation_result.description: Reference to the report about the dataset validation.

provenance.title: has provenance
provenance.description: A statement about the lineage of a Dataset.

additional_publication_year.title: publication year
additional_publication_year.description: The year when the item was or will be made publicly available.
